heading_path: Clinical Practice Guideline: Tympanostomy Tubes in Children (Update)
Clinical Practice Guideline: Tympanostomy Tubes in Children (Update)
paragraph_or_text_span: The purpose of this clinical practice guideline is to reassess and update recommendations in the prior guideline from 2013 and to provide clinicians with trustworthy, evidence-based recommendations on patient selection and surgical indications for managing tympanostomy tubes in children. This guideline is intended for any clinician involved in managing children, aged 6 months to 12 years, with tym

heading_path: Clinical Practice Guideline: Tympanostomy Tubes in Children (Update)
Endorsements
paragraph_or_text_span: This guideline is endorsed by the American Academy of Audiology, International Society for Otitis Media, Society for Pediatric Anesthesia, and Society of Otorhinolaryngology Head-Neck Nurses. The guideline is supported by the American Speech-Language-Hearing Association.

heading_path: Clinical Practice Guideline: Tympanostomy Tubes in Children (Update)
Topic Submission By
paragraph_or_text_span: Topic was submitted by Dr. David E. Tunkel for the American Society of Pediatric Otolaryngology; American Academy of Otolaryngology-Head and Neck Surgery Pediatric Otolaryngology Committee in 2010 .
